name: White Asparagus in White Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Ham, cut into julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the white asparagus spears and reserve half a cup of the liquid.
2. Heat margarine in a saucepan.
3. Add flour to the heated margarine; blend until smooth.
4. Gradually pour in the reserved asparagus liquid and milk, stirring constantly over low heat.
5. Continue cooking until the sauce thickens and bubbles.
6. Stir in the cooked ham and seasonings (nutmeg and salt).
7. Gently mix in the asparagus spears.
8. Heat through but do not boil.
9. Serve in a preheated serving dish.
